free_text: Measurements of secondary gamma-ray production cross
section for Fe-nat, 51V, Mo-nat, Zr-nat, Ni-nat and
181-Ta with Hp-Ge detector induced by D-T neutrons
A relative source neutron yield was monitored
Measured data are compared with the theoretical
Time-of-flight method was employed to separate
prompt gamma-rays signals from the whole time spectrum
SD: Ref. on Conf. abstract deleted.
The accuracy of data presentation  has been revised.
